title: Ikigai
html:
Stub. Japanese concept for life-purpose at the intersection of (what you love, what you're good at, what the world needs, what you can be paid for). Used in Yahir's corpus as a titling container more than as a framework actively engaged.

In-vault appearances

  • 2022 04 05 ikigai blackbird — note titled "Ikigai" but body contains only an omen capture ("Saw a black bird fly in front me. 5:04 pm 2002. 5 april. 2022"). The framework is gestured at; the moment is what's recorded.

Pattern note

This is a single-use container so far — Yahir reached for the term once as a folder-label, then never returned to it. If a 2nd mention appears in another note, this stub graduates. Until then, it lives as a flag for the title-as-framework, body-as-moment mismatch pattern.

Wikilinks
